fetch_method: public Replicate API reference page; no prediction created

character_orientation.description: Orientation of the character in the generated video. 'image': same orientation as the person in the picture (max 10s video). 'video': consistent with the orientation of the characters in the video (max 30s video). When binding elements, only 'video' orientation is supported.
character_orientation.title: character_orientation

image.description: Reference image. The characters, backgrounds, and other elements in the generated video are based on the reference image. Supports .jpg/.jpeg/.png, max 10MB, dimensions 340px-3850px, aspect ratio 1:2.5 to 2.5:1.
image.title: Image

keep_original_sound.description: Whether to keep the original sound of the reference video
keep_original_sound.title: Keep Original Sound

mode.description: Video generation mode. 'std': Standard mode (720p, cost-effective). 'pro': Professional mode (1080p, higher quality).
mode.title: mode

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation. You can add elements to the screen and achieve motion effects through prompt words.
prompt.title: Prompt

video.description: Reference video. The character actions in the generated video are consistent with the reference video. Supports .mp4/.mov, max 100MB, 3-30 seconds duration depending on character_orientation.
video.title: Video
